cards.title: Anthropic Revenue Hits $47B Annualized Ahead of IPO
cards.body: Anthropic announced annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up dramatically from roughly $9 billion at the end of 2025. The company faces a real test as it approaches its IPO with this growth trajectory.

cards.title: Poke Becomes First AI Agent on Apple Messages Business
cards.body: Poke, a startup enabling AI agents through simple text messages, has been approved for Apple's Messages for Business platform. This marks the first AI agent approved for the platform.

cards.title: Meta Launches AI Creator Assistant on Facebook
cards.body: Meta rolled out a new AI assistant that helps creators quickly answer performance questions like 'When should I post?' and 'What are people saying in my comments?' without parsing through charts and dashboards.

cards.title: Hello Robot Releases Fourth-Generation Stretch Home Robot
cards.body: The California startup released the fourth-generation of its home assistance robot, Stretch, advancing home robotics adoption. Hello Robot is demonstrating Silicon Valley's readiness to put robots in people's homes.

cards.title: Lovable Expands Google Cloud Partnership 5x with Claude Access
cards.body: Lovable and Google signed a multiyear deal expanding Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud by 5x. The deal also includes expanded access to Anthropic's Claude model.

cards.title: Alphabet Raises Record $85B for Google AI Business
cards.body: Alphabet completed a record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signaling strong investor appetite for AI-related offerings. The move demonstrates market confidence in Google's AI strategy.

cards.title: Google Launches Dreambeans AI-Illustrated Story Tool
cards.body: Dreambeans is Google's new AI tool that curates illustrated 'stories' from the personal data in your Google account. The tool turns user content into cartoon-style visualizations.

cards.title: Amazon Uses AI to Generate Product Search Images
cards.body: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI-generated product images matching your search queries. The retailer says this feature helps guide users to relevant products.

cards.title: UK Requires Google Offer AI Search Publisher Opt-Out
cards.body: U.K. regulators are requiring Google provide a tool allowing website publishers to opt-out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the U.K. before global rollout.

cards.title: Meta's WhatsApp AI Agent Now Available Globally
cards.body: Meta's AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available worldwide. WhatsApp will charge businesses based on token usage for the AI agent service.

cards.title: Coralogix Raises $200M for AI Agent Monitoring Tools
cards.body: Coralogix is betting that demand will rise for tools to monitor AI systems in production, troubleshoot failures, and provide operational data. The infrastructure firm is among growing companies addressing AI reliability needs.

cards.title: Cyera Eyes $12B Valuation Despite Operating Losses
cards.body: The cybersecurity company is nearing a $300 million funding round led by Evolution Equity Partners at an 80x ARR multiple. The valuation comes despite the company's operating losses.

cards.title: Uber Caps Employee AI Spending After 4 Months
cards.body: Uber has capped employee AI spending after the budget was exhausted in just four months. The cutback occurred after the company had encouraged staff to use AI extensively.

cards.title: Mira Murati Steps Back Into Industry Spotlight
cards.body: In the current competitive environment, remaining low-profile has diminishing returns as companies need market visibility. Leadership is making strategic moves to remind the market of their presence.

cards.title: Airbnb Plans to Launch New AI Lab
cards.body: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky announced plans to launch a new AI lab focused on developing internal AI capabilities. The decision comes after the company determined existing LLM partnerships weren't quite ready.

cards.title: Meta Builds Data Centers Inside Tents
cards.body: Meta has found a way to potentially slash its massive data center costs by constructing facilities inside tents. The creative infrastructure approach addresses growing computational demands.

cards.title: Apple Intelligence and Siri Revamp Coming at WWDC 2026
cards.body: Apple's upcoming WWDC 2026 will feature a highly anticipated revamp of Siri and updates to Apple Intelligence. The announcements are expected to showcase Apple's AI advancement strategy.

cards.title: Apple App Store Generates $1.4 Trillion in Sales
cards.body: Apple's App Store generated $1.4 trillion in sales, up from $1.3 trillion the previous year, with $149 billion in digital goods sales. 90% of App Store sales occurred without Apple taking a commission.

cards.title: Voice AI Startup Serves Africa and Middle East Markets
cards.body: Two former Goldman Sachs and Meta founders built voice AI targeting underserved African and Middle Eastern markets. Their proprietary stack is now handling over 17,000 calls daily.

cards.title: StrictlyVC Los Angeles Explores Defense Tech and AI
cards.body: On June 18, The Aerospace Corporation Campus will host StrictlyVC Los Angeles, bringing together investors and tech leaders. The event will explore shifts in venture capital, defense technology, and artificial intelligence.

cards.title: Mira Murati steps back into the spotlight, carefully
cards.body: In the current environment, remaining heads down has diminishing returns. At some point, you have to make some noise just to remind the market you exist.

cards.title: Anthropic's Amodei shrugs off doubts about AI returns
cards.body: Anthropic announced annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up dramatically from roughly $9 billion at the end of 2025. That trajectory now faces a real test.

cards.title: Apple approves Poke as first AI agent on Messages
cards.body: Poke has become the first AI agent approved for Apple's Messages for Business platform. The startup lets people use AI agents through simple text messages.

cards.title: Meta rolls out AI creator assistant on Facebook
cards.body: Creators can now get quick answers to questions like "When should I post?" and "What are people saying in my comments?" using the new AI assistant. It eliminates the need to parse through charts and dashboards manually.

cards.title: What to expect from WWDC 2026: Siri revamp
cards.body: Apple's WWDC nears with highly anticipated Siri revamp and Apple Intelligence updates on the horizon.

cards.title: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud
cards.body: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal involving a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud. The deal includes expanded access to Anthropic Claude.

cards.title: Alphabet's $85B raise signals strong AI investor appetite
cards.body: Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale for Google's AI business signals strong investor appetite for AI-related offerings.

cards.title: Google's Dreambeans turns your life into cartoon
cards.body: Dreambeans is a curated list of AI-illustrated "stories" culled from the personal data in your Google account. The tool transforms user data into visual narrative content.

cards.title: Amazon uses AI to show generated product images
cards.body: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI-generated product images matching your search queries. The retailer says it will help guide users to products.

cards.title: Voice AI startup tackles overlooked African markets
cards.body: Two founders left Goldman and Meta to build voice AI for Africa and Middle East. The startup's stack is now handling more than 17,000 calls per day.

cards.title: Publishers can opt out of AI Search via regulation
cards.body: U.K. regulators are requiring Google offer a tool allowing website publishers to opt-out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the U.K. then rolled out globally.

cards.title: Meta's AI agent for WhatsApp Business available globally
cards.body: WhatsApp will charge businesses for using its AI agent based on token usage. The AI agent is now available globally.

cards.title: Coralogix raises $200M to monitor AI agents
cards.body: Coralogix is betting that as AI systems move into production, demand will rise for monitoring tools. The company provides infrastructure to troubleshoot failures and keep AI systems running reliably.

cards.title: Uber caps employee AI spending after four months
cards.body: Uber's cutback occurred after the company had encouraged staff to use AI as much as possible. The company blew through its budget in just four months.

cards.title: Courts cope with flood of AI-generated lawsuits
cards.body: Judge Maritza Braswell in Colorado sifts through stacks of AI-generated legal documents from people without lawyers. Many cases are too weak or small to interest lawyers.

cards.title: Virtual power plants could power AI data centers
cards.body: Google signed a deal to help pay for a virtual power plant in the largest US power grid. The agreement is designed to help provide energy for data centers.

cards.title: Small businesses leverage AI across departments
cards.body: From accounting to design to market research, AI is providing skills needed to run businesses. Small companies can now use AI for a staggering breadth of tasks.

cards.title: Agentic AI rehumanizes global health care
cards.body: The global health care sector faces chronic underinvestment and recruitment constraints amid surging demand. Agentic AI offers solutions to fill gaps in fragmented access to care.

cards.title: LLMs best at resisting Russian propaganda
cards.body: Certain large language models demonstrate superior resistance to Russian propaganda compared to others. This capability is increasingly important in information security.

cards.title: Google's Gemma 4 12B runs on any laptop
cards.body: Google's new Gemma 4 12B model is designed to run on any laptop with 16GB of RAM. The model brings AI capabilities to consumer-grade hardware.

cards.title: Microsoft, Atom Computing update quantum progress
cards.body: Microsoft and Atom Computing announced updates to their quantum computing progress. The companies continue advancing quantum AI capabilities.

cards.title: Google must clarify AI Search links, let publishers opt out
cards.body: Google is ordered to put clearer links in AI search results and let U.K. publishers opt out. Regulators are tightening oversight of AI-powered search features.
